name: claude-wiki
description: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern for Obsidian + Claude Cowork. JP default, EN fallback. Requires kepano/obsidian-skills (hard dependency). v0.1.0 ships 4 skills (setup-claude-wiki, add-page, lint-vault, query-wiki) + 2 hooks (.obsidian/ write-guard PreToolUse, vault-first-reminder SessionStart) + bundled CANONICAL.md schema.
